mnemonics: Proof of Work: Very Hard Work Validates (VHWV)
Delegated Proof of Stake: Don't Pick Slow Kids (DPSK)
Byzantine Fault Tolerance: Brave Friends Trust (BFT)
keyPoints: A consensus mechanism is a protocol that enables all nodes in a decentralized network to agree on the validity of transactions and the current state of the ledger.
Different mechanisms (e.g., Proof of Work, Proof of Stake, Byzantine Fault Tolerance) achieve consensus by trading off between security, decentralization, and scalability (the 'Blockchain Trilemma').
The mechanism is fundamental to preventing double-spending and maintaining the network's integrity without a central authority.
commonMistakes: Assuming all blockchain consensus mechanisms are equally energy-intensive like Proof of Work (PoW). Many, like Proof of Stake (PoS), are designed to be extremely energy-efficient.

Confusing the purpose of the mechanism. Its primary goal is to achieve agreement on a *single truth* (a canonical chain), not just to create new coins (mining/staking rewards are an incentive, not the core purpose).
